title: ballota hirsuta var. vellerea
intro: Ballota hirsuta var. vellerea, also known as Velvet Balm or Hairy Ballota, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its distinctive velvety leaves and stems. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Ballota hirsuta var. vellerea include its ability to treat wounds, eczema, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
